- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature / new test module

## Checklist
- [ ] `mvn clean test` passes locally
- [ ] New tests include `@Epic`, `@Feature`, `@Story`, `@Severity`, `@Description` Allure annotations
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials, tokens, or API keys in source code
- [ ] Schema files updated if API response structure changed
- [ ] `dependsOnMethods` used correctly for CRUD chains
- [ ] README updated if a new module or config key was added
